svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 600px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: k1s0 tier1 論理 ER モデル (最上位レベル)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 95px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Tenant
━━━━━━━━━
PK tenant_id (UUIDv7)
name
tier (enum)
status
created_at
deleted_at

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 95px; margin-left: 352px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
User
━━━━━━━━━
PK user_id (UUIDv7)
FK tenant_id
subject (Keycloak sub)
email (PII 中)
display_name (PII 低)
roles[]
created_at
last_login_at

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 95px; margin-left: 652px;

div.div:
Application
━━━━━━━━━
PK app_id (UUIDv7)
FK tenant_id
name
tier (2|3)
service_account
runtime (rust|go|.net)
created_at
